startUrls.title: Start URLs
startUrls.description: List of URLs to start scanning for broken images. The crawler will follow links on the same domain.

maxPagesPerCrawl.title: Max Pages to Scan
maxPagesPerCrawl.description: Maximum number of pages to crawl across the entire site.

checkExternalImages.title: Check External Images
checkExternalImages.description: If enabled, the actor will also ping images hosted on third-party domains (CDNs, S3, etc.).
